data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying options to improve decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design reducing number of actions.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Design for ease of clicking targets and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Larger click areas for common actions.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect functionality consistent with other major sites.
data.technical_spec: Familiar patterns and components in UI design.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing designs perceived as more functional.
data.technical_spec: Modern, clean interfaces with visual hierarchy.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements close together are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Visual grouping of related interface elements.
